llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Country Controller
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position In charge of financial planning, forecasting, reporting and business analysis and commercial controlling support for APA business in country. Act as financial advisor, challenger and business partner to the APA Local Business Manager (LBM) in all matters of financial relevance including business steering and projects/initiatives. Be the go-to person for Compliance questions. Be member of the country and business area APA management team Main Tasks Financial Reporting and Forecasting Operational Planning: Responsible for monthly actual reporting and full year forecasting of P L, specific balance sheet items and sales. Conduct forecasting processes as part of the integrated planning process (supply FC, demand FC, financial FC). Accountable for developing, tracking and reporting financial scenarios (risks opportunities). Develop business commentary for corporate management. Identify risks/downsides and opportunities/upsides to sales plan. Document and track risks and opportunities including likelihood and decision time and review on a monthly basis. Commercial and Operational Controlling: Collect and review calendarized articles including volumes and prices.
